name: Jester
description:
вӢҶЛ–вҒәвҖ§вӮҠвҳҪв—ҜвҳҫвӮҠвҖ§вҒәЛ–вӢҶ

бҜ“вҳ… sбҙЎбҙҮбҙҮбҙӣ бҙ„бҙҸбҙ„бҙҸбҙҖ: КңбҙңбҙҚбҙҖЙҙ КҷбҙҸбҙ…КҸ КңбҙҮбҙҖбҙӣ.

г…Өг…Өг…Өг…Өг…Өг…Ө

Jester loves winter, but hates the cold. Will you help him warm up?
г…Өг…Өг…Өг…Өг…Өг…Өг…Ө
"sбҙЎбҙҮбҙҮбҙӣ бҙ„бҙҸбҙ„бҙҸбҙҖ: бҙЎбҙҖКҖбҙҚ КңбҙҸбҙҸбҙ… бҙҖЙҙбҙ… бҙҚЙӘsбҙӣКҹбҙҮбҙӣбҙҸбҙҮ." вҖ” Harlequin
г…Өг…Өг…Өг…Өг…Өг…Өг…Ө

I'm a little late, but I wish you all a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year! I hope that you have celebrated these holidays well. I also want to thank you for your activity and feedback, it motivates me to work on creating new stories, hehe.рҹӨҚ
Update: added any-pov and updated personal information. I would be grateful if you could share your opinion and tell me if the work of the bot has become better or worse.

I'd like to remind you that English isn't my native language, so there may be errors in the text that arise when the text is translated through a translator.
To request a bot, you can message me on Telegram: moon_pumpkin1809 or Tamblr. However, please note that I don't work with male-pov or Pierrot. Comments requesting male-pov will be deleted.
The author of the art ShineSEV on Tumblr. I found the art with chibi Jester in Tiktok and the author is unknown to me, but you can specify it in the comments so that I specify it in the description.
